## What changed

Describe the focused change and the solver, renderer, CLI, or documentation
area it affects.

## Physical model

- [ ] The change preserves fixed-timestep deterministic simulation.
- [ ] The selected physical model fits the affected object family.
- [ ] Renderer changes do not move physics state into the rendering layer.
- [ ] New or changed artwork includes provenance and licensing information.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] HyperFrames `npm run check` when the demo composition changed
- [ ] Visual fixtures updated only after reviewing before/after evidence

Commands and results:

```text

```

## Visual evidence

Add screenshots or a short capture for visible changes. Generated MP4 files
should be attached to the pull request or release, not committed.
